scope.question: candidate_review: Required review lane is missing: extraction_fidelity.

inputs.summary: Bounded context pack for the extraction_fidelity supervisor review lane.
Target submitted candidate change under extraction_fidelity review.
Proposed result record adding registry aggregate adverse-event counts, risk ratio, uncertainty, and caveats.
Proposed registry synthesis-boundary update preserving mixed-endpoint pooling blockers.
Proposed safety synthesis-boundary update preserving single-trial, overlap, and term-level limitations.
ClinicalTrials.gov source snapshot used to verify adverse-events eventGroup counts.
Normalized registry text snapshot and artifacts used for extraction-fidelity checking.
PubMed source snapshot confirming the no-serious-adverse-events safety context cited by the proposed records.

outputs.summary: Created the bounded repair candidate and extraction_fidelity evidence review. The review accepts the target candidate lane with closed note-level findings: registry other-adverse-event counts match 23/30 D+Q and 5/30 untreated control, the risk ratio and uncertainty calculations match those counts, and aggregate endpoint boundaries remain explicit in the result and synthesis records.

proposed_records.rationale: Tracks this bounded supervisor-lane repair candidate and its evidence-review ledger.
Adds the missing extraction_fidelity supervisor review for the target extraction-debt repair candidate.

quality_checks.summary: Reviewed only the required extraction_fidelity lane; the evidence review is complete, non-blocking, verdict accept, and has no open major or critical findings.
Final outputs.proposed_records exactly match the repair candidate proposed_records ledger.
